hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^git commit( |$)' && ! echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'no-verify'; then /Users/pavvel/workspace/projects/replystack/.claude/hooks/pre-commit-security.sh; fi
